LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION OF REQUEST FOR DIMSISSAL OF PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITH PREJUDICE AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS DENIED. WHEN THE SUSTAINED THE DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND ON JUNE 27, 2012, IT WAS UNAWARE THAT PLAINTIFF HAD FILED A VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL ON JUNE 26, 2012 AT 3:36 P.M., WHICH WAS AFTER THE COURT ISSUED ITS TENTATIVE RULING SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. GROTH BROS. OLDSMOBILE, INC. V. GALLAGHER (2002) 97 CAL.APP.4TH 60 IS DISTINGUISHABLE ON ITS FACTS. THE JUNE 27, 2012 ORDER SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IS VACATED IN LIGHT OF THIS ORDER. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENNA WARD, CSR # 7077 =302/MJM

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF DESPITE A HEARING WAS REQUIRED BY THE COURT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ERNICE FAGAN'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL OF ACTION IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT SHE VOLUNTARILY DISMISSED THIS CASE (516891) ("CASE 1") ON JUNE 26, 2012, "IN ANTICIPATION OF THE HEARING THAT WAS SET FOR THE DEMURRER" ON HER SECOND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT THAT WAS THEN SCHEDULED TO BE HEARD ON JUNE 27, 2012. (MEMO. AT 1.) PLAINTIFF THEN FILED ANOTHER CASE (525904) ("CASE 2") ON NOVEMBER 7, 2012 REGARDING THE SAME INCIDENT THAT IS THE SUBJECT OF CASE 1. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE THE PRESENT MOTION TO SET ASIDE HER VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL IN CASE 1 UNTIL JUNE 20, 2013. THIS IS NOT WITHIN SIX MONTHS OF THE DISMISSAL THAT WAS ENTERED ON JUNE 26, 2012, AND WHICH IS REQUIRED BY STATUTE. (CCP 473(B).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL OF ACTION

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion O Vacate Dismissal Of Action
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRADLEY A. RUSSI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3964 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF DESPITE A HEARING WAS REQUIRED BY THE COURT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ERNICE FAGAN'S Motion to Vacate Dismissal Of Action is denied as untimely. Plaintiff states that she voluntarily dismissed this case (516891) ("Case 1") on June 26, 2012, "in anticipation of the hearing that was set for the demurrer" on her Second Amended Cross Complaint that was then scheduled to be heard on June 27, 2012. (Memo. at 1.) Plaintiff then filed another case (525904) ("Case 2") on November 7, 2012 regarding the same incident that is the subject of Case 1. Plaintiff did not file the present motion to set aside her voluntary dismissal in Case 1 until June 20, 2013. This is not within six months of the dismissal that was entered on June 26, 2012, and which is required by statute. (CCP 473(b).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Request For Dimsissal Of Pltf'S Second Amended Complaint With Prejudice And Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ERNICE FAGAN, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. LEONOR NOGUEZ-WARD, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3854 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion Of Request For Dimsissal Of Plaintiff'S Second Amended Complaint With Prejudice And Entry Of Judgment is
Denied. When the sustained the demurrer with leave to amend on June 27, 2012, it was unaware that plaintiff had filed a voluntary dismissal on June 26, 2012 at 3:36 p.m., which was after the Court issued its tentative ruling sustaining the demurrer with leave to amend. Groth Bros. Oldsmobile, Inc. v. Gallagher (2002) 97 Cal.App.4th 60 is distinguishable on its facts. The June 27, 2012 order sustaining the demurrer with leave to amend is vacated in light of this order. Request for judicial notice is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVenna Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/MJM
